privileged_info_summary: Task involves creating a dynamic e-commerce collection block in a Drupal Commerce environment with synthetic but accurately-modeled data. Target products are real: Sony WH-1000XM5 (official Bluetooth headphones with 30-hour battery and 8 microphones for noise cancellation) at $348 USD, and Logitech MX Master 3S (official wireless mouse with 8K DPI and 70-day battery) at $99.99 USD. All machine names (collections vocabulary, field_collection field, summer_collection view) are verified in task scripts and environment setup. Data is environment-specific test data created for a Docker-based Drupal Commerce setup.
